user.title: Minol Energy – Sign In
user.description:
**Step 1:** Open the link below in your browser and sign in with your Minol account:

[Open Minol login]({auth_url})

**Step 2:** After signing in, your browser will navigate to a Postman page. Copy the **full URL** from the address bar (it starts with `https://oauth.pstmn.io/v1/callback?code=…`) and paste it below.

data.redirect_url: Redirect URL (paste from browser address bar)

reauth_confirm.title: Minol Energy – Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description:
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

**Step 1:** Open the link below in your browser:

[Open Minol login]({auth_url})

**Step 2:** After signing in, copy the full URL from the browser address bar (starts with `https://oauth.pstmn.io/v1/callback?code=…`) and paste it below.

data.redirect_url: Redirect URL (paste from browser address bar)

error.invalid_auth: Token exchange failed. Please try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Minol API.
error.invalid_redirect_url: The pasted URL does not contain an authorization code. Make sure you copied the full URL from the browser address bar after signing in.
